name_en: 【With full counter green packaging】!!️GG Marmont series leather bi-fold wallet, Gucci continuously updates colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This bi-fold wallet is crafted from grey leather, with brand logo accessories presented in palladium tone. Grey leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, one side for cards and one side for coin pocket.
name_cn:
【With full counter green packaging】!!️GG Marmont series leather bi-fold wallet, Gucci continuously updates colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This bi-fold wallet is crafted from grey leather, with brand logo accessories presented in palladium tone. Grey leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, one side for cards and one side for coin pocket.
Model: 428725.
Open dimensions: 21(W) x 9cm(H)
Closed dimensions: 11(W) x 9cm(H)
Color: Grey hardware/Full leather
